---
applyTo: '**/*.html'
---
# HTML File Instructions
- Ensure that the HTML structure is semantic and follows best practices for accessibility.
- Use proper indentation (2 spaces) for nested elements to enhance readability.
- use comments to separate different sections of the HTML document
- dont use inline styles; instead, link to an external CSS file for styling.
- Make sure to include meta tags for character set (UTF-8) and viewport settings for responsive design.
